/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib CMakeFiles/fairuz.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/arena.cc.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/ast.cc.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/compiler.cc.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/diagnostic.cc.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/fobject.cc.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/formatter.cc.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/gc.cc.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/lexer.cc.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/loop_header.cc.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/opcode.cc.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/optim.cc.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/parser.cc.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/ssa_loop.cc.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/stats.cc.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/stdlib.cc.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/token.cc.o CMakeFiles/fairuz_objects.dir/fairuz/vm.cc.o -o fairuz  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsimdutf.34.0.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib/libomp.dylib
